channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-07 08:21 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: As grooming gangs take over the UK, London’s birth rate is collapsing faster than anywhere else in t...
item.description: As grooming gangs take over the UK, London’s birth rate is collapsing faster than anywhere else in the country. It now has a birth rate of a paltry 1.2 births per woman. London faces a serious risk of becoming a childless city. The UK will cease to exist as it’s known today.

item.title: @elonmusk: The beginning of wisdom is to call things by their proper name. - Confucius
item.description: The beginning of wisdom is to call things by their proper name. - Confucius

item.title: @elonmusk: Many people don't understand just how brutal diminishing returns in theoretical physics were. Physic...
item.description: Many people don't understand just how brutal diminishing returns in theoretical physics were. Physics barely existed before 1820. After 1970, there was essentially nothing left to discover. In 1819 there were probably less than 100 full-time paid physicists in the whole world. By 2026 there are probably about a million physicists across academia and industry, and that number was already huge in the 1970s when physics sort of "ended" with QCD and electroweak unification. A small, brave band of gentlemen-scholars and amateurs worked out the most important parts of physical law in the 1800s. People doing it as a hobby! Today, vast armies of professionals equipped with supercomputers toil away in the quantum gravity dungeon, unable to make progress. Diminishing returns are brutal.

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD Supervised makes an 8h drive feel like a 30 minute errand
item.description: FSD Supervised makes an 8h drive feel like a 30 minute errand

item.description: Post filters are now live on X profiles.

item.title: @elonmusk: One image to Grok Imagine. Result: she dives in, swims through a glowing neon underwater world, and ...
item.description: One image to Grok Imagine. Result: she dives in, swims through a glowing neon underwater world, and surfaces clean. 30 seconds of pure flow.

item.title: @elonmusk: Lost dreams begins with love.. A music video created using videos generated with Grok. Music - Suno ...
item.description: Lost dreams begins with love.. A music video created using videos generated with Grok. Music - Suno Video - Grok Imagine Made by 🅶🆁🅾🅺@grokImagine 💫

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX Falcon 9 created this beautiful "jellyfish" glow on its way up to deploy 29 Starlink satellit...
item.description: SpaceX Falcon 9 created this beautiful "jellyfish" glow on its way up to deploy 29 Starlink satellites on March 4

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine gets better almost every day
item.description: Grok Imagine gets better almost every day

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI just dropped a Text to Speech API! 5 voices (eve, ara, rex, sal, leo), inline speech tags, WebSo...
item.description: xAI just dropped a Text to Speech API! 5 voices (eve, ara, rex, sal, leo), inline speech tags, WebSocket streaming, and format support from high-fidelity WAV all the way down to telephony mulaw. You can write things like: "So I walked in and [pause] there it was. [laugh] I honestly could not believe it!" Or wrap sections: <whisper>It is a secret.</whisper> Pauses, laughs, chuckles, sighs, breathing, pitch, speed, volume. Actual expressive control baked into the text itself. Three lines of curl to get started. No SDK needed. This pairs with the xAI Realtime API. Voice in, voice out, Grok in the middle. The full stack is there now. Beta pricing. Go play with it.

item.title: @elonmusk: "Elon Musk still works incredibly hard. I visited him recently, I left around midnight and he was st...
item.description: "Elon Musk still works incredibly hard. I visited him recently, I left around midnight and he was still working. I think he must have gone till 2am. I don't know anybody who works as hard as him." Elon works every waking hour, 7 days a week. That is why he wins.

item.title: @elonmusk: X needs more Grok DJ catgirls 😎🎧
item.description: X needs more Grok DJ catgirls 😎🎧

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
